allow: Bash(node -e "const cp = require\('child_process'\); cp.exec\('where yt-dlp', \(e,out\) => console.log\('where:', out.trim\(\)\)\); cp.exec\('yt-dlp --version', \(e,out\) => console.log\('version:', out.trim\(\)\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const cp = require\('child_process'\); cp.exec\('yt-dlp --version', \(e,o\) => console.log\('yt-dlp:', o.trim\(\)\)\);")
